LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT FLORENCE FANG MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION AND STAYING ACTION, SUBMITTED ON APR-16-2003 BY RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT-MOVING PARTY & FOR PLAINTIFF-OPPOSING PARTY. ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. PARTIES TO SUBMIT RESPECTIVE ORDERS. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647

DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY FURTHER TRIAL COURT PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.THE COURT GRANTS THE DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO HAVE THIS MATTER ARBITRATED IN ACCORDANCE WITH MANDATORY FEE ARBITRATION PROVISIONS CONTAINED IN CAL. BUSINESS & PROFESSIONS CODE. THIS ALTERNATIVE WAS APPROVED BY THE MOVING PARTY AT THE HEARING. THE COURT DENIES THE DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO HAVE THIS ARBITRATED BEFORE THE AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSO.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-20-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
